title: Post's lattice with a schematic symbolic n-layer

data.label: BF
data.description: All Boolean functions.

data.label: R1
data.description: All 1-reproducing Boolean functions.

data.label: R0
data.description: All 0-reproducing Boolean functions.

data.label: R2
data.description: All Boolean functions that are both 0-reproducing and 1-reproducing.

data.label: M
data.description: All monotone Boolean functions.

data.label: M1
data.description: All monotone 1-reproducing Boolean functions.

data.label: M0
data.description: All monotone 0-reproducing Boolean functions.

data.label: M2
data.description: All monotone Boolean functions that are both 0-reproducing and 1-reproducing.

data.label: S21
data.description: All 1-separating Boolean functions of degree 2.

data.label: S31
data.description: All 1-separating Boolean functions of degree 3.

data.label: S1
data.description: All 1-separating Boolean functions.

data.label: S212
data.description: All 1-separating Boolean functions of degree 2 that are both 0-reproducing and 1-reproducing.

data.label: S312
data.description: All 1-separating Boolean functions of degree 3 that are both 0-reproducing and 1-reproducing.

data.label: S12
data.description: All 1-separating Boolean functions that are both 0-reproducing and 1-reproducing.

data.label: S211
data.description: All 1-separating Boolean functions of degree 2 that are monotone.

data.label: S311
data.description: All 1-separating Boolean functions of degree 3 that are monotone.

data.label: S11
data.description: All 1-separating Boolean functions that are monotone.

data.label: S210
data.description: All 1-separating Boolean functions of degree 2 that are both 0-reproducing and 1-reproducing and monotone.

data.label: S310
data.description: All 1-separating Boolean functions of degree 3 that are both 0-reproducing and 1-reproducing and monotone.

data.label: S10
data.description: All 1-separating Boolean functions that are both 0-reproducing and 1-reproducing and monotone.

data.label: S20
data.description: All 0-separating Boolean functions of degree 2.

data.label: S30
data.description: All 0-separating Boolean functions of degree 3.

data.label: S0
data.description: All 0-separating Boolean functions.

data.label: S202
data.description: All 0-separating Boolean functions of degree 2 that are both 0-reproducing and 1-reproducing.

data.label: S302
data.description: All 0-separating Boolean functions of degree 3 that are both 0-reproducing and 1-reproducing.

data.label: S02
data.description: All 0-separating Boolean functions that are both 0-reproducing and 1-reproducing.

data.label: S201
data.description: All 0-separating Boolean functions of degree 2 that are monotone.

data.label: S301
data.description: All 0-separating Boolean functions of degree 3 that are monotone.

data.label: S01
data.description: All 0-separating Boolean functions that are monotone.

data.label: S200
data.description: All 0-separating Boolean functions of degree 2 that are both 0-reproducing and 1-reproducing and monotone.

data.label: S300
data.description: All 0-separating Boolean functions of degree 3 that are both 0-reproducing and 1-reproducing and monotone.

data.label: S00
data.description: All 0-separating Boolean functions that are both 0-reproducing and 1-reproducing and monotone.

data.label: D
data.description: All self-dual Boolean functions.

data.label: D1
data.description: All self-dual Boolean functions that are both 0-reproducing and 1-reproducing.

data.label: D2
data.description: All monotone self-dual Boolean functions.

data.label: E
data.description: All Boolean functions that are a conjunction or a constant.

definition.sourceLatex: \set{f \mid f \text{ is a conjunction or constant}}
definition.latex: \{f\mid f\text{ is a conjunction or constant}\}
definition.plain: {f | f is a conjunction or constant}

data.label: E1
data.description: The conjunctive clone that is monotone and 1-reproducing.

data.label: E0
data.description: The conjunctive clone that is monotone and 0-reproducing.

data.label: E2
data.description: The conjunctive clone that is monotone, 0-reproducing, and 1-reproducing.

data.label: V
data.description: All Boolean functions that are a disjunction or a constant.

definition.sourceLatex: \set{f \mid f \text{ is a disjunction or constant}}
definition.latex: \{f\mid f\text{ is a disjunction or constant}\}
definition.plain: {f | f is a disjunction or constant}

data.label: V0
data.description: The disjunctive clone that is monotone and 0-reproducing.

data.label: V1
data.description: The disjunctive clone that is monotone and 1-reproducing.

data.label: V2
data.description: The disjunctive clone that is monotone, 0-reproducing, and 1-reproducing.

data.label: L
data.description: All linear Boolean functions.

data.label: L0
data.description: All linear 0-reproducing Boolean functions.

data.label: L1
data.description: All linear 1-reproducing Boolean functions.

data.label: L3
data.description: All self-dual linear Boolean functions.

data.label: L2
data.description: All linear Boolean functions that are both 0-reproducing and 1-reproducing.

data.label: N
data.description: All Boolean functions that depend on at most one variable.

definition.sourceLatex: \set{f \mid f \text{ depends on at most one variable}}
definition.latex: \{f\mid f\text{ depends on at most one variable}\}
definition.plain: {f | f depends on at most one variable}

data.label: N2
data.description: The essentially unary self-dual clone.

data.label: I
data.description: All Boolean functions that are a projection or a constant.

definition.sourceLatex: \set{f \mid f \text{ is a projection or a constant}}
definition.latex: \{f\mid f\text{ is a projection or a constant}\}
definition.plain: {f | f is a projection or a constant}

data.label: I0
data.description: All projections together with the constant-false function.

data.label: I1
data.description: All projections together with the constant-true function.

data.label: I2
data.description: All projections, without constants.

data.label: S₀ⁿ
data.description: All 0-separating Boolean functions of degree n.

data.label: S₀₂ⁿ
data.description: All 0-separating Boolean functions of degree n that are both 0-reproducing and 1-reproducing.

data.label: S₀₁ⁿ
data.description: All 0-separating Boolean functions of degree n that are monotone.

data.label: S₀₀ⁿ
data.description: All 0-separating Boolean functions of degree n that are both 0-reproducing and 1-reproducing and monotone.

data.label: S₁₀ⁿ
data.description: All 1-separating Boolean functions of degree n that are both 0-reproducing and 1-reproducing and monotone.

data.label: S₁₁ⁿ
data.description: All 1-separating Boolean functions of degree n that are monotone.

data.label: S₁₂ⁿ
data.description: All 1-separating Boolean functions of degree n that are both 0-reproducing and 1-reproducing.

data.label: S₁ⁿ
data.description: All 1-separating Boolean functions of degree n.
